## Fillings.LinearScaler class

Generic linear scaler for units like grams and milliliters. Used as the default fallback for unknown units.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class LinearScaler implements IUnitScaler 
```
**Implements:** [IUnitScaler](./ts-chocolate.fillings.iunitscaler.md)
